name: git-fried
description: GitKraken alternative desktop git client. Gitea first-class, Korean-safe, Tauri-light, multi-repo native.
author: tgkim

scripts.test: bun run --cwd apps/desktop test && cargo test --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.fmt: bun run --cwd apps/desktop fmt && cargo fmt --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
